entries.title: GitHub Release Note Auto-Author
entries.notes: Scrapes merged PRs since last tag, categorizes by label/prefix, generates changelog draft. Simple semantic versioning prefix detection. Built with GitHub API + simple NLP. Ship in 2 weeks.
entries.pain: Engineers waste hours manually writing release notes from merged PRs before shipping.

entries.title: Stripe MRR Waterfall Visualizer
entries.notes: Pulls Stripe events, renders real-time MRR waterfall showing new, expansion, contraction, churn. Uses Stripe webhooks. Niche but valuable for SaaS operators.
entries.pain: Founders and finance teams struggle to visualize subscription churn and expansion in a single view.

entries.title: Cold Email Reply Intent Classifier
entries.notes: Scrapes Gmail threads, classifies replies as intent, auto-reply, unsubscribe, or dead. Uses lightweight keyword/pattern matching. Quick MVP with rule-based logic.
entries.pain: Sales reps waste time on auto-replies and out-of-office messages instead of real leads.

entries.title: Browser Request Signature Debugger
entries.notes: Intercepts requests with signatures, replays with modified payloads, shows validation failures inline. Developer tools panel extension. Useful for API integrators.
entries.pain: Debugging HMAC or JWT request signatures is painful without seeing raw payloads side-by-side.

entries.title: Conference Attendee Badge Scanner
entries.notes: Uses webcam to scan badges via QR or OCR, enriches with LinkedIn/company data. GDPR-conscious with local processing. Great networking tool for solo founders.
entries.pain: Sales reps collect business cards at conferences but never follow up effectively due to lack of context.

entries.title: AI Token Budget Exhaustion Alert
entries.notes: Monitors API calls per tab, predicts token budget exhaustion, warns before hitting limits. Cross-LLM support. Critical for power users of AI tools.
entries.pain: Users accidentally blow through API quotas mid-conversation and get cut off unexpectedly.

entries.title: Webhook Event Type Distribution Chart
entries.notes: Logs all webhook events in DevTools panel, shows distribution pie chart over time. Helps identify spam vs signal in webhook streams.
entries.pain: Developers debugging webhook integrations can't see which event types fire most frequently.

entries.title: Sales Deck Slide Reading Time Estimator
entries.notes: Analyzes slide content density, images, and text length, estimates realistic reading time. Warns before sending. Useful for pitch prep.
entries.pain: Sales reps send decks that are too long, causing prospects to lose interest halfway through.

entries.title: GCP Resource Zombie Hunter
entries.notes: Queries GCP asset inventory API, flags resources with no traffic for 30+ days. Suggests deletion or downsizing. Integrates with billing exports.
entries.pain: Teams forget about idle cloud resources, accumulating unnecessary costs month after month.

entries.title: Email Thread Emotional Tone Arc
entries.notes: Analyzes sentiment arc across email threads, shows whether tone is trending positive/negative. Simple keyword sentiment scoring. Helps calibrate responses.
entries.pain: People misread email tone and respond defensively, escalating unnecessary conflict.

entries.title: Lead Company Hiring Velocity Score
entries.notes: Scrapes LinkedIn job postings over time, calculates hiring velocity. Shows if company is aggressively hiring or slowing down. Signals urgency.
entries.pain: Sales reps have no signal on whether a prospect company is growing or shrinking before outreach.

entries.title: Browser Console API Call Cost Tracker
entries.notes: Instruments fetch/XHR calls, tags third-party domains, estimates cost based on typical API pricing. Shows cost per page load in DevTools.
entries.pain: Frontend devs have no visibility into how many third-party API calls their pages make and at what cost.

entries.title: Recruiter Message Response Time Heatmap
entries.notes: Analyzes timestamps of recruiter emails, builds heatmap of send times. Suggests optimal reply windows. Simple inbox metadata analysis.
entries.pain: Job seekers miss optimal reply windows because they don't know when recruiters are most active.

entries.title: Favicon Security Risk Scanner
entries.notes: Checks favicon URLs for tracking capabilities, warns about favicon fingerprinting vectors. Educational privacy tool with actionable alerts.
entries.pain: Users don't realize favicons can be used to track them across sites via favicon-based cookies.

entries.title: Meeting Transcript Redaction Helper
entries.notes: Highlights PII, API keys, internal hostnames in transcripts. One-click redaction. Useful for async-first teams. Built with regex + heuristics.
entries.pain: Engineers waste time manually redacting sensitive data from meeting transcripts before sharing.
